MADE BY B. |. GORDON

pages.raw_text:
was again advanced, to $500 per
hundred, and has stood at that fig
ure ever since: that is. for the last
four years, and consequently We are
now paying 10 cents hundred
more in carload lots and have paid
1t for four years than we were pay
ing some six or seven years ago.
This amounts to quite a consider
able tax on us for our efforts in try
ing to get better freight rates for
Spokane jobbers. After the grant
ing of the carload rate. distributed
my business among all of the rail-
roads, and | am free to admit that
am today giving more of my ship
ments to the o. r. & n. than to
any other one line. but I am not
giving that line the greater portion
of my shipments. My shipments on
the Northern Pacific have increased
since the granting of that rate.
